amendment.description: To make funds available for the timely adjudication of DACA renewal applications.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5813 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 47 - 52. Record Vote Number: 156.

action.text: Amendment SA 5813 proposed by Senator Gallego to Amendment SA 5453. To make funds available for the timely adjudication of DACA renewal applications.
